title: sabina excelsa
intro: Sabina excelsa, also known as the Juniperus phoenicea or Phoenicean juniper, is a species of coniferous tree in the cypress family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Sabina excelsa include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to help reduce anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Sabina excelsa include essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
